title: Flaky Earthy Malaysian Yeast Extract Crumble
description: This earthy and flaky dish features clotted cream in a pescatarian-friendly meal-prep option that combines the rich flavors of Malaysian cuisine with a unique twist.

ingredients.name: 2 cups clotted cream
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's unsalted and at room temperature

ingredients.name: 10 grams yeast extract powder
ingredients.notes: Make sure to have a fresh one for best results

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine clotted cream and yeast extract powder.
Add salt to taste. Mix well until the mixture becomes thick enough to be handled by your hands.
Gradually add flour while kneading with your hands to create a soft dough. Keep adding more flour as needed until it's not sticky but still holdable.
Roll out the dough into thin sheets using a rolling pin, keeping the edges slightly thicker for a crumble effect.
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a baking sheet and lay down your prepared sheets of dough. Bake for about 2-3 minutes or until they start to puff up slightly.
Remove from heat and let it cool before slicing into small pieces, making them easier to store in the fridge for future snacking.
